recent_projects.name: MoleditPy-linux
recent_projects.summary: A cross-platform, simple, and intuitive molecular structure editor built in Python. It allows 2D molecular drawing and 3D structure visualization. It supports exporting structure files for input to DFT calculation software.

recent_projects.name: dashgram
recent_projects.summary: A Python SDK for Dashgram

recent_projects.name: rns
recent_projects.summary: Self-configuring, encrypted and resilient mesh networking stack for LoRa, packet radio, WiFi and everything in between
recent_projects.author: Mark Qvist

recent_projects.name: surfaces
recent_projects.summary: A collection and visualization of black-box objective functions

recent_projects.name: kuavo-humanoid-sdk-ws
recent_projects.summary: A Python SDK for kuavo humanoid robot.
recent_projects.author: ['lejurobot']

recent_projects.summary: SkelForm runtime for Pygame. Uses the generic runtime

recent_projects.name: kuavo-humanoid-sdk
recent_projects.summary: A Python SDK for kuavo humanoid robot.
recent_projects.author: ['lejurobot']

recent_projects.name: obra
recent_projects.summary: Obra - Cloud-native AI orchestration platform for autonomous software development
recent_projects.author: Unpossible Creations, Inc.

recent_projects.name: splut
recent_projects.summary: Actor model for Python
recent_projects.author: foyono

recent_projects.name: simplet5-trl
recent_projects.summary: simpleT5-TRL is built on top of HuggingFace Transformers and TRL that lets you quickly train encoder-decoder models (T5, BART, T5Gemma, etc.) with full finetuning, LoRA, QLoRA, DPO, SimPO, and RFT support.

recent_projects.name: vast-admin-mcp
recent_projects.summary: VAST Admin MCP Server - MCP server for VAST Data administration tasks

recent_projects.name: sound-soup
recent_projects.summary: BeautifulSoup-style API for audio transcription and analysis

recent_projects.name: MoleditPy
recent_projects.summary: A cross-platform, simple, and intuitive molecular structure editor built in Python. It allows 2D molecular drawing and 3D structure visualization. It supports exporting structure files for input to DFT calculation software.

recent_no_vcs_projects.name: MoleditPy-linux
recent_no_vcs_projects.summary: A cross-platform, simple, and intuitive molecular structure editor built in Python. It allows 2D molecular drawing and 3D structure visualization. It supports exporting structure files for input to DFT calculation software.

recent_no_vcs_projects.name: dashgram
recent_no_vcs_projects.summary: A Python SDK for Dashgram
recent_no_vcs_projects.author: MrNereof

recent_no_vcs_projects.name: surfaces
recent_no_vcs_projects.summary: A collection and visualization of black-box objective functions

recent_no_vcs_projects.name: skelform-pygame
recent_no_vcs_projects.summary: SkelForm runtime for Pygame. Uses the generic runtime

recent_no_vcs_projects.name: obra
recent_no_vcs_projects.summary: Obra - Cloud-native AI orchestration platform for autonomous software development
recent_no_vcs_projects.author: Unpossible Creations, Inc.

recent_no_vcs_projects.name: simplet5-trl
recent_no_vcs_projects.summary: simpleT5-TRL is built on top of HuggingFace Transformers and TRL that lets you quickly train encoder-decoder models (T5, BART, T5Gemma, etc.) with full finetuning, LoRA, QLoRA, DPO, SimPO, and RFT support.

recent_no_vcs_projects.name: vast-admin-mcp
recent_no_vcs_projects.summary: VAST Admin MCP Server - MCP server for VAST Data administration tasks

recent_no_vcs_projects.name: sound-soup
recent_no_vcs_projects.summary: BeautifulSoup-style API for audio transcription and analysis

recent_no_vcs_projects.name: MoleditPy
recent_no_vcs_projects.summary: A cross-platform, simple, and intuitive molecular structure editor built in Python. It allows 2D molecular drawing and 3D structure visualization. It supports exporting structure files for input to DFT calculation software.
